title: mentha sylvestris var. alpigena
intro: Mentha sylvestris var. alpigena, also known as mountain mint, is a variety of the wild mint plant (Mentha sylvestris) that is native to mountainous regions. It has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties, making it a natural remedy for various health issues. The health benefits of mountain mint include relief from digestive issues, colds and flu, and skin irritations, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate headaches. Mountain mint can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in aromatherapy to promote relaxation and ease respiratory issues.
